failures.description: The agent misread or ignored the ProductCatalogSearch output, which contained two valid matches above the minimum price, and produced an answer saying there were no matches.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user asked for available Mechanical Keyboards with RGB backlight costing more than $233.90. The ProductCatalogSearch result at index 3 returned two matching available items, priced 272.33 and 237.48, both above 233.90. At index 4, the Executor had this tool output available but synthesized the opposite answer: 'No items match that filter above the given price.' This directly contradicts the tool result and was not later corrected; the Evaluator at index 5 reinforced the same wrong interpretation.
